---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that the bot can't do today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Security impact

Does this widen what the bot can do (new Docker capability, looser allowlist,
fewer confirmations)? If so, describe the blast-radius trade-off and how it
could stay opt-in / off by default. See the "Extending it" section of the
README.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.
